bug_locations.reason: The handling of `decompress_response` and deprecated `use_gzip` can leave `self.decompress_response` unset or incorrectly inherited when both values are `None`. This area directly affects request option defaults and compatibility behavior.

`_RequestProxy.__getattr__` falls back to defaults only when the request attribute is `None`, which may mishandle falsy-but-valid values such as `False` or empty strings. Several tests exercise precedence between explicit request values and defaults.

The `body` setter unconditionally applies `utf8(value)`, which may incorrectly transform or reject `None` and certain byte/string combinations. Multiple tests validate body handling and encoding semantics.
